name: QhpHlthPlnEnrIdsProdQhpExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT DISTINCT QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ENR.QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ID, QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ENR.PROD_ID, QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ENR.ENR_EFF_DT, QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ENR.ENR_TERM_DT, B.LAST_UPDT_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_BCBSOwner}.QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ENR QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ENR,(SELECT DISTINCT ENR.QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ID, ENR.PROD_ID, max(ENR.LAST_UPDT_DT) LAST_UPDT_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_BCBSOwner}.QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ENR ENR WHERE ENR.ENR_EFF_DT <> ENR.ENR_TERM_DT GROUP BY ENR.QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ID, ENR.PROD_ID) B WHERE QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ENR.QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ID = B.QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ID AND QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ENR.PROD_ID = B.PROD_ID AND QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ENR.ENR_EFF_DT <> QLFD_HLTH_PLN_ENR.ENR_TERM_DT

Description:
Called By: SbcIdsProdQhpExtCntl

JobName: QhpHlthPlnEnrIdsProdQhpExtr

Process : Extract data from QHP_HLTH_PLN_ENR table to load into IDS PROD_QHP  table
